macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Mixed on March 10 Amid Iran War Uncertainty
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 0.2% to 6,781.48, Dow dropped 0.1% to 47,706.51, and Nasdaq was flat at 22,697.10 as investors awaited signals on the Iran war's end. Oil prices pulled back after plunging from $120 to $90 per barrel on de-escalation hopes.

items.title: Nasdaq 100 Hits Fib 0.382 Support at 24,909; DAX 40 Oversold
items.summary: Global indexes showed Nasdaq 100 at 24,909 on Fibonacci 0.382 support and DAX 40 at 23,847 with deeply oversold RSI of 31.8 during institutional analysis on March 10.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Yann LeCun Raises $1.03 Billion for AI Startup AMI
items.summary: AI pioneer Yann LeCun launched Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI), securing $1.03 billion to develop safer AI systems using real-world sensor and camera data for world models in robotics, healthcare, and automation. The startup, with offices in Paris, New York, Montreal, and Singapore, appointed Alex LeBrun as CEO.

items.title: Cybersecurity Expert Unveils AI-vs-AI Strategy Against Threats
items.summary: Dima Shaposhnykov proposed an AI-based defense using reasoning, deception via simulated attack surfaces, and reinforcement learning for autonomous policy adjustments to counter generative AI attacks by threat actors.

items.title: SANS Releases Paper on Autonomous Threat Emulation with Agentic AI
items.summary: A new whitepaper details using agentic AI for dynamic threat emulation and detection to address limitations of traditional frameworks against adaptive Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs).

items.title: Coinbase CEO Predicts AI Agents Will Drive Crypto Transactions
items.summary: Brian Armstrong stated AI agents will soon outnumber humans in transactions but cannot open bank accounts due to KYC; he promotes crypto wallets as the solution already implemented by Coinbase.

items.title: Supreme Court Considers Patentability of Artificial Neural Networks
items.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court is evaluating whether inventions based on artificial neural networks qualify for patent protection.

items.title: Science Paper: AI as Next Stage in Evolution for Cancer Research
items.summary: A Science Signaling article argues AI, including neural networks and large language models, can model nonlinear cancer processes and neuron-cancer interactions, advancing fields like protein prediction and therapy discovery.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Multiple Game Releases Scheduled for March 11-13 Including Haunted Lands and Monster Hunter Stories 3
items.summary: Upcoming releases include Haunted Lands on PC via Steam on March 11, Solateria, Monster Hunter Stories 3, and others like Stellar Wonder DX and Solasta 2 on March 13. Free titles Deponia on Steam and Turnip Boy Robs a Bank on Epic are also highlighted.

items.title: HEAVENHELLS Launches Globally on Mobile; Steam Tower Defense Fest Begins
items.summary: HEAVENHELLS has launched globally on mobile platforms. The Steam Tower Defense Fest is underway through March 16.

items.title: Valve Delays New Hardware Due to Supply Issues; Microsoft Project Helix Leak Reveals Dual Console-PC Modes
items.summary: Valve reports supply chain problems delaying its new hardware lineup. A Microsoft Project Helix leak suggests dual console and PC modes with 32GB of memory.

items.title: Hololive Dreams Rhythm RPG Opens Global Pre-Registration
items.summary: Hololive Dreams, a rhythm RPG mobile game developed by QualiArts and Cover Corporation, has opened global pre-registration following a trailer reveal at Hololive Super Expo 2026.

items.title: Four Major Decompilation Projects in Progress Including Silent Hill 3
items.summary: Active decomp projects for The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess (100% complete), Silent Hill 3 (0.9% decompiled), and others like Banjo Kazooie are advancing, boosting retro gaming preservation.

items.title: Destiny 2 Receives Major Patch Notes and Eververse Reset
items.summary: Destiny 2 rolled out patch notes, new Eververse loot, fixes, and a weekly reset on March 10, with Guardian Games event teased for later in the month.

items.title: Captain of Industry Update 4 Launches with New DLC
items.summary: Update 4 for Captain of Industry introduces bridges, tier 2 stackers, and more, accompanied by a new DLC, available as of March 10.

items.title: Mobile Gaming Industry Shifts Focus to Player Retention
items.summary: With 5,000 games downloaded every minute, mobile developers are prioritizing strategies to retain players over acquisition.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
